@graph.schema:name: Chef Maria
@graph.schema:description: Italian cuisine specialist with 20 years experience

@graph.schema:name: Chef Carlos
@graph.schema:description: Expert in Mexican and Latin American cooking

@graph.schema:name: Chef Lee
@graph.schema:description: Asian fusion chef and cookbook author

@graph.schema:name: Classic Spaghetti Carbonara
@graph.schema:description: A rich and creamy Roman pasta dish made with eggs, cheese, pancetta, and black pepper. This traditional recipe creates a silky sauce without using cream.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: spaghetti, eggs, pecorino romano, guanciale, black pepper, salt
@graph.recipe:instructions: Cook pasta until al dente. Fry guanciale until crispy. Mix eggs with cheese. Combine hot pasta with guanciale, remove from heat, add egg mixture. Toss quickly to create creamy sauce.

@graph.schema:name: Authentic Margherita Pizza
@graph.schema:description: The classic Neapolitan pizza with fresh tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil. Simple ingredients showcase the beauty of Italian cooking.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: pizza dough, san marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, fresh basil, olive oil, salt
@graph.recipe:instructions: Stretch dough into circle. Spread crushed tomatoes. Add torn mozzarella. Bake at 500F until crust is golden and cheese bubbles. Top with fresh basil and olive oil.

@graph.schema:name: Tacos al Pastor
@graph.schema:description: Mexican street tacos with marinated pork, pineapple, and fresh cilantro. The smoky, sweet, and savory flavors come from the adobo marinade and grilled pineapple.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: pork shoulder, dried chiles, pineapple, corn tortillas, onion, cilantro, lime
@graph.recipe:instructions: Marinate pork in adobo sauce overnight. Grill pork with pineapple until caramelized. Slice thin. Serve on warm tortillas with onion, cilantro, and lime.

@graph.schema:name: Fresh Guacamole
@graph.schema:description: Creamy avocado dip with lime, cilantro, and jalapeño. Perfect for chips or as a topping for tacos and burritos.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: ripe avocados, lime juice, red onion, jalapeño, cilantro, salt, tomato
@graph.recipe:instructions: Mash avocados to desired consistency. Add lime juice, diced onion, minced jalapeño, chopped cilantro, and salt. Fold in diced tomato. Serve immediately.

@graph.schema:name: Authentic Pad Thai
@graph.schema:description: Thailand's famous stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, eggs, and tamarind sauce. The balance of sweet, sour, salty, and spicy defines this iconic dish.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: rice noodles, shrimp, tofu, eggs, bean sprouts, tamarind paste, fish sauce, palm sugar, garlic, peanuts, lime
@graph.recipe:instructions: Soak noodles until pliable. Make tamarind sauce. Stir-fry garlic, add shrimp and tofu. Push aside, scramble eggs. Add noodles and sauce. Toss with bean sprouts. Serve with peanuts and lime.

@graph.schema:name: Traditional Miso Soup
@graph.schema:description: A warming Japanese soup with fermented soybean paste, tofu, and seaweed. Simple but deeply flavorful, often served with rice and pickles.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: dashi stock, white miso paste, silken tofu, wakame seaweed, green onion
@graph.recipe:instructions: Heat dashi stock. Add wakame and tofu cubes. Remove from heat. Whisk miso paste with a little stock, then stir into soup. Serve immediately with sliced green onion.

@graph.schema:name: Fudgy Chocolate Brownies
@graph.schema:description: Dense, rich chocolate brownies with a crackly top and gooey center. Perfect for chocolate lovers who want intense cocoa flavor in every bite.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: butter, dark chocolate, sugar, eggs, vanilla, flour, cocoa powder, salt
@graph.recipe:instructions: Melt butter and chocolate together. Whisk in sugar and eggs. Add vanilla. Fold in flour, cocoa, and salt. Pour into greased pan. Bake at 350F until set but still fudgy.

@graph.schema:name: Creamy Hummus
@graph.schema:description: Smooth chickpea dip with tahini, lemon, and garlic. A Mediterranean staple perfect with pita bread, vegetables, or as a sandwich spread.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, olive oil, cumin, salt, paprika
@graph.recipe:instructions: Blend chickpeas with tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and cumin. Add cold water to reach desired consistency. Season with salt. Serve drizzled with olive oil and sprinkled with paprika.

@graph.schema:name: Asian Vegetable Stir-Fry
@graph.schema:description: A quick and healthy dish with crisp vegetables in a savory ginger soy sauce. High heat cooking keeps vegetables vibrant and crunchy.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: broccoli, bell peppers, snap peas, carrots, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, sesame oil, vegetable oil
@graph.recipe:instructions: Heat wok until smoking. Add oil and vegetables in order of cooking time. Stir-fry until crisp-tender. Add garlic and ginger. Sauce with soy and sesame oil. Serve immediately over rice.

@graph.schema:name: Classic Banana Bread
@graph.schema:description: Moist and tender quick bread made with overripe bananas. The natural sweetness of ripe bananas creates an irresistible flavor and tender crumb.
@graph.recipe:ingredients: ripe bananas, butter, sugar, eggs, vanilla, flour, baking soda, salt, walnuts
@graph.recipe:instructions: Mash bananas. Cream butter and sugar. Add eggs and vanilla. Combine dry ingredients. Fold wet into dry. Add nuts. Bake at 350F until toothpick comes out clean.
